name: Pasta and Peas
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Fontina or mozzarella cheese, shredded
1/2 cup Cooked ditalini or other tube macaroni
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart saucepan, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until onion is translucent.
3. Add mushrooms; sauté until they release their liquid, about 2 minutes.
4. Stir in tomato juice and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer until the sauce thickens slightly, about 15 minutes.
6. Add peas and cook for an additional 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Mix in macaroni and shredded cheese; stir until the cheese melts completely.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve immediately.
Makes 2 servings.
